evidence_items.summary: The package includes an AI-assisted synthesis plus one retained source reference.

grounding_explanation.summary: The evidence package is only partially grounded because it retains a primary source reference but no declared current source-of-truth reference.
basis: A primary source reference remains attached to the evidence item.
No source-of-truth ref is currently declared in the package.
Verification remains declared-only and does not fetch source material.
limitations: This preview does not attempt freshness recovery or live validation.
This preview does not treat partial grounding as a deny or block.

omissions.reason: No current source-of-truth reference is declared for this partially grounded package.

uncertainty_notes.summary: Declared-only verification leaves freshness and completeness uncertainty unresolved.

contrary_artifact_refs.summary: A counterargument brief notes that the source reference may be stale without a current source-of-truth anchor.

evidence_adequacy.adequacy_explanation: Evidence adequacy remains supporting-only: the package records the missing source-of-truth reference explicitly, preserves uncertainty as metadata, and keeps contrary artifacts as non-authoritative supporting references.
